title: hyptis paludosa
intro: Hyptis paludosa, also known as marsh hyptis or marsh lemon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Hyptis paludosa include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
